targets.sourceTitle: Principios y recomendaciones de uso de la IA generativa en EHU
expectedThemes: declaration and citation of AI use

stopConditions: Stop after official EHU source text supports narrow claim candidates.
Do not infer binding university-wide policy from training pages, research news, or faculty-only pages.
Preserve Spanish evidence snippets as canonical source evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery identified one EHU-wide Spanish PDF on principles and recommendations for generative AI use. Official training and research-news pages were retained as rejected candidates because they do not directly support institutional policy claims.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Perfil de la o del participante: Alumnado de Doctorado de la UPV/EHU. Fechas: Noviembre 2025. Duracion / Horario: 20 horas.
artifacts.notes: The page is official and AI-relevant, but it describes a doctoral training course rather than policy, permitted-use rules, or institutional guidance.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Un estudio liderado por investigadores de la UPV/EHU destaca que la IA replico el comportamiento de los docentes con una precision del 70 %.
artifacts.notes: The page is an official research/news article and not an institutional policy or guidance source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Principios y recomendaciones de uso de la IA generativa en EHU

artifacts.claimText: EHU says generative AI use is not prohibited, but it must be transparent, ethical, responsible, and consistent with institutional academic-integrity principles.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Principios y recomendaciones de uso de la IA generativa en EHU
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: En consecuencia, el uso de IA generativa en EHU no está prohibido, pero sí requiere transparencia, atribución adecuada y un uso ético, conforme a principios institucionales de integridad académica.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: EHU states that generative AI use is not prohibited, but it requires transparency, proper attribution, and ethical use consistent with academic integrity.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Por ello, el uso de sistemas de IA generativa debe ser explícitamente declarado en los trabajos y contenidos generados y, especialmente, en trabajos como TFGs, TFMs o Tesis Doctorales.

artifacts.claimText: EHU guidance lists prohibited generative AI uses including presenting AI-generated content as one's own, using AI-generated content in work without declaring it, entering student or research-subject personal data, and uploading confidential or sensitive personal or institutional information.

citation.citationTitle: Principios y recomendaciones de uso de la IA generativa en EHU
citation.publisher: Universidad del Pais Vasco / Euskal Herriko Unibertsitatea

artifacts.sourceTitle: Principios y recomendaciones de uso de la IA generativa en EHU
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Usos prohibidos de IA generativa: Presentar los contenidos generados por la IA generativa como propios; Utilización de los contenidos generados por la IA generativa en trabajos sin declarar su uso; Introducción de datos personales del estudiantado o de sujetos de investigación; Subir documentos confidenciales o con información personal o institucional sensible.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: EHU lists as prohibited uses presenting AI-generated content as one's own, using AI-generated content in work without declaring it, entering student or research-subject personal data, and uploading confidential or sensitive information.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 12, recommendations for students and prohibited uses
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow claim because the official EHU PDF explicitly says generative AI use is not prohibited but requires transparency, attribution, ethical use, and academic integrity.

Approved as a narrow academic-integrity claim because the evidence directly states that generative AI use must be explicitly declared in generated work and especially in TFG, TFM, and doctoral thesis work.
Approved as a narrow privacy and academic-integrity claim because the evidence lists specific prohibited uses and does not rely on a page title or search snippet.

artifacts.title: University of the Basque Country generative AI guidance staged crawl
artifacts.summary: The staged crawl found an official EHU Spanish PDF, dated 17-09-2025, setting principles and recommendations for generative AI use. The approved claim candidates are limited to EHU's stated position that generative AI use is not prohibited when transparent and ethical, explicit declaration expectations for AI use in generated academic work, and listed prohibited uses involving undeclared AI content and personal or confidential data.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The doctoral training page and Campusa research-news page were not used as policy evidence because they do not directly state institutional policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
